penalties.description: No FLS task performance visible - video shows only product demonstration of laparoscopic instruments without any suturing, knot tying, or Penrose drain work.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as a promotional/demonstration video with no actual FLS task performance. GPT-4o incorrectly scored what appears to be instrument demonstration as task completion. The video contains no suture material, Penrose drain, marked targets, or laparoscopic trainer setup required for Task 4.

disagreements.rationale: No actual task performance occurred to time according to Claude's detailed analysis of video content

gpt_value.description: Suture does not follow the marked target accurately

disagreements.rationale: GPT-4o appears to have misidentified demonstration footage as actual task performance; incomplete_task is the appropriate automatic-zero condition
No actual FLS task phases occurred in demonstration video according to Claude's analysis
Incomplete task results in automatic zero score regardless of other factors
